The space

One hall, dressed a hundred ways

High ceilings for drapes and installations, a raised stage, and a clean shell that takes any colour theme your decorator dreams up.

Full AC · Cool all day
0indoor
guests
500 indoor · 100 outdoorBanquet, theatre or ceremony layouts, plus an outdoor area for cocktails.
Fully air-conditionedIndustrial AC keeps the hall cool through a full Lagos afternoon.
70 parking spacesSecure on-site parking in the compound, with room for vendors to load in.
Clean & accessibleRestrooms kept clean all event. Wheelchair-accessible entrance, parking and toilet.
Every celebration welcomeWeddings, birthdays, burials, church programmes, conferences. Card and transfer accepted.
Raised stage & vendor spaceRoom for live bands, MCs, caterers and decorators to set up comfortably.

Occasions

Made for the moments that matter

Weddings & traditional engagements

I

Space for both families and everyone they invited, a raised stage for the couple, and room for live bands, MCs and full catering.

Birthdays & kids' parties

II

Rated good for kids' birthdays, a safe, cool, enclosed hall that scales from 50 guests to 500.

Burials & celebrations of life

III

A dignified, comfortable space to receive sympathisers, with parking and vendor access inside the compound.

Church programmes & conferences

IV

Theatre seating for large congregations, with space for sound and media setups.

Find us

Easier to find than you think

The hall sits inside a compound just off Festac Link Road. Three landmarks get you to the gate.

1

Take Festac Link Road and look out for the Mobil Filling Station, we are directly beside it.

2

Turn into the compound of Love Aglow Christian Assembly, Anetta is within the same premises.

3

Drive in, parking is inside the compound, with space for your vendors too.

Google plus code  F7GG+FC Lagos
